title: Computerized Vehicles
description: An integration addon for Immersive Vehicles and computer mods!
body:
**Computerized Vehicles** is an integration addon for Immersive Vehicles to integrate with computer mods!

### Current Integrations:
- CC: Tweaked

### Current Features
This mod adds a new **Vehicle API** to Command Computers! This new API can be used to create, manage, and delete vehicles! You can even control and customize said vehicles!

### Credits
Big thanks to **Leveloper** for the commission and **STheEngineer** for giving me permission to peek into IVRC!
